title: Southern Enclave
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Southern Enclave''' was an area of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. In a tragic accident, one of [[Xizor/Legends|Xizor's]] more persistent [[Xizor's ex-mistress|mistresses]] found herself accidentally encased in a [[Duracrete/Legends|duracrete]] foundation in the Enclave by a [[Construction droid/Legends|construction droid]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' novel]]

[[Category:Coruscant districts]]
